summary: Tested mobile admin collapsible sidebar with paw print toggle. All 6 features verified working: (1) Paw print toggle visible on mobile left side, (2) Toggle opens/closes sidebar, (3) Sidebar shows Quick Access, Pillars, Members, Reports sections, (4) Universal Seed + Tags button present, (5) Touch optimization CSS (touch-action: manipulation) applied, (6) Input fields have 16px font-size to prevent iOS zoom.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin mobile sidebar is fully functional. Paw print toggle at left=0, top=384 (vertically centered). Sidebar sections: Quick Access (Dashboard, Service Desk, Orders, Inbox), Pillars (8 items in 2-column grid), Members (Pet Parents, Pets, Membership), Reports (Reports, Analytics, MIS). Universal Seed + Tags button at bottom. Touch optimization CSS verified.

paw_print_toggle_visible.details: data-testid='admin-sidebar-toggle' visible on mobile, positioned at left=0

toggle_opens_closes_sidebar.details: Click toggles sidebarCollapsed state, sidebar slides in/out

quick_access_section.details: Contains Dashboard, Service Desk, Orders, Inbox buttons

pillars_section.details: Contains Celebrate, Dine, Shop, Care, Stay, Travel, Fit, Learn in 2-column grid

members_section.details: Contains Pet Parents, Pets, Membership buttons

universal_seed_tags_button.details: Button visible at bottom of sidebar, enabled and clickable

touch_action_manipulation.details: CSS touch-action: manipulation applied to buttons

input_font_size_16px.details: Input fields have font-size: 16px to prevent iOS zoom on focus
